Instructions: Participants rated face stimuli on three SAM (Self-Assessment Manikin) dimensions: valence, arousal, and dominance.

emotion.Description: Emotional expression of the face stimulus.

dimension.Description: SAM dimension rated on this trial.

Levels.valence: How happy or unhappy does this image make you feel?
Levels.arousal: How excited or calm does this image make you feel?
Levels.dominance: How controlled or in control does this image make you feel?

rating.Description: Selected SAM manikin (1–5 Likert), parsed from PsychoPy mouse.clicked_name.
